title: System Generator
subtitle: Choose a system type and enter the solutions.
inputXY: Enter the solutions x and y:
fraction_hint: You may also enter fractions in the form p/q. Recommended range: -20 … 20.
input_hint: Enter the solutions x, y from the keyboard, either integers or fractions p/q from the set {-20, -19, ..., 19, 20}.
sym_type1: Type 1 (ax + ay + bxy ; cx + cy - axy)
sym_type2: Type 2 (ax + ay - bxy ; x² + y² + bx + by)
linquad_title: Systems with first and second degree equations
lin2x2_type4: System 4 (simple modules: a|x-y| + b|x+y| ; c|x+y| + d|x-y|)
lin2x2_type5: System 5 (compound modules: a|2x-y| + b|x+3y| ; c|2x-y| + d|x+3y|)
